column.text:
• Los Angeles Angels placed CF Mike Trout on the 10-day injured list with a right hamstring strain.
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list with back spasms.
• The Angels designated 1B Trey Mancini for assignment after activating second baseman Vaughn Grissom from the injured list.
• St. Louis Cardinals designated RHP Chris Roycroft for assignment.
• Atlanta Braves acquired C Joey Bart from the Pittsburgh Pirates in exchange for RHP Hunter Stratton.
• Detroit Tigers placed 2B Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list with a left oblique strain.
• The Tigers activated RHP Casey Mize from the 15-day injured list to take Torres' roster spot.
• Cincinnati Reds sent RHP Hunter Greene to the Arizona Complex League to begin a rehab assignment.
• New York Mets sent SS Ronny Mauricio on a rehab assignment to Single-A St. Lucie.
• The Braves also designated C Sandy León for assignment to clear a roster spot for Joey Bart.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
